// Generated by bpmn-to-code
package de.emaarco.example.types

import kotlin.String
import kotlin.collections.List

data class BpmnRelations(
  val name: String? = null,
  /**
   * IDs of BPMN elements (not sequence flows) that directly precede this element. Use `Flows` to traverse the connecting sequence flows.
   */
  val previousElements: List<String>,
  /**
   * IDs of BPMN elements (not sequence flows) that directly follow this element. Use `Flows` to traverse the connecting sequence flows.
   */
  val followingElements: List<String>,
  val parentId: String?,
  val attachedToRef: String?,
  val attachedElements: List<String>,
)
